creator: vd@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: freebsd-python->freebsd-ports

The patch in ports/106120 is not from the maintainer (which is gnome@) 
and the PR has been closed without commit. 

Assign this to ports@ since the responsible party is not clear. 
Please do not reassign this from gnome@ to python@ and back without 
coming to a consensus.
